---
name: Design Feedback
about: UI/UX feedback on a screen or component
title: '[Design] '
labels: design
assignees: ''
---

## Screen or Component
Name the screen or SwiftUI component this feedback is about.
(e.g. "Intent Detail Screen", "FeedCard", "Create Intent form")

## Feedback / Issue
Describe the design problem or what feels off.

## Suggested Change
What should it look like or how should it behave instead?

## Figma Link (optional)
Link to the relevant Figma frame or component.

## Screenshots
If helpful, attach a screenshot of the current state.
